archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast Dark)
rationale: EduFlow is a Chat-first school management app. Dark theme was explicitly requested. The design optimizes for a 'Claude-like' chat interface, prioritizing high contrast data presentation (Archetype 4) while maintaining a modern, premium SaaS feel with subtle colorful accents (Archetype 5) on tool icons to differentiate the extensive suite of tools.

sidebar.item_layout: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-1.5 p-2 rounded-xl transition-colors hover:bg-white/5 w-full
sidebar.icon_size: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-1

chat_area.user_bubble: bg-[#1C1C28] border border-[#222230] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-3.5 max-w-[85%] ml-auto text-slate-200 shadow-sm
chat_area.ai_avatar: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-indigo-500/20 text-indigo-400 border border-indigo-500/30 flex items-center justify-center font-bold font-outfit shrink-0
chat_area.input_container: fixed bottom-0 left-[120px] right-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0A0F] via-[#0A0A0F] to-transparent pt-10 pb-6 px-4 md:px-8 z-40
chat_area.input_box: bg-[#1C1C28] border border-[#222230] rounded-2xl flex items-center p-2 shadow-2xl mx-auto max-w-4xl

header.layout: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-[#222230] bg-[#0A0A0F] sticky top-0 z-50 ml-[120px]

rich_cards.style: bg-[#161622] border border-[#222230] rounded-xl p-5 shadow-lg mt-3 overflow-hidden
rich_cards.tables: w-full text-sm text-left text-slate-300 divide-y divide-[#222230]

search_bar.style: bg-[#161622] border border-[#222230] text-slate-200 rounded-full px-4 py-2 w-full max-w-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-500 transition-shadow text-sm placeholder:text-slate-500

role_indicator.style: flex items-center gap-3 bg-[#161622] border border-[#222230] rounded-full pl-2 pr-4 py-1.5 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#1C1C28] transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is strictly enforced globally. Use the specific hex codes provided (e.g., bg-[#0A0A0F], border-[#222230]) directly in Tailwind utility classes rather than relying entirely on generic tailwind slate/gray colors.

Implement the left sidebar fixed at 120px width. Sidebar items should be vertically stacked blocks (Icon above, Title, Subtitle below). Use tight line heights and smaller text for titles (text-[11px]) and subtitles (text-[9px]) to fit.
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' (for headings/brand/avatar) and 'Manrope' (for body) and configure them in your global CSS.
For the AI message avatar, use an 'E' text logo inside a rounded-lg box with an indigo-500/20 background and indigo text.

The chat input should be 'floating' at the bottom of the main chat area with a dark rounded-2xl styling. Provide adequate bottom padding to the chat list so the last message isn't hidden behind the floating input.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and key sections for robust automated testing.
For rich data cards generated in the chat (tables, stat cards, metric blocks), strictly use the designated component styles (bg-[#161622] with border-[#222230]).
Ensure the footer text 'EduFlow\'s AI can make mistakes...' is styled as text-xs text-slate-500 and placed below the input box inside the floating input container.
Make sure to install 'lucide-react' for all iconography across the app.
